articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Canadian goods - NPR
articles.description: President Donald Trump on Monday imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods, declaring that Canada has unfairly discriminated against American autos, alcohol and dairy products.
articles.content:
WASHINGTON President Donald Trump on Monday imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods, declaring that Canada has unfairly discriminated against American autos, alcohol and dairy products.

articles.title: Man stabs tourists near the Acropolis in Athens, Greece - AP News
articles.description: A man has stabbed and wounded two tourists near the ancient Acropolis in Athens, Greece’s top tourist attraction. The assailant attacked a man and a woman, both Greek Americans, with a knife Tuesday morning near the entrance to the Acropolis Museum, which lie…
articles.content:
ATHENS, Greece (AP) A man stabbed and wounded two tourists Tuesday morning near the ancient Acropolis in Athens, Greeces top tourist attraction, police said.
